pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates CSV file at this exact path (lines 17-22)
DJI official specifications confirm Mavic 2 Pro takeoff weight is 31.99 ounces = 907 grams
Autel Robotics specifications confirm EVO II weight is approximately 1150 grams across multiple variants
Parrot official specifications confirm original Anafi takeoff weight is 320 grams
setup_task.sh creates distractor aircraft with this name (line 64)
setup_task.sh creates distractor aircraft with mass=25.5 kg (line 65)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates with a synthetic CSV datasheet created at /home/ga/manufacturer_datasheet.csv containing three real-world aircraft specifications: Mavic 2 Pro (907 grams / 0.907 kg), Autel Evo II (~1150 grams / 1.15 kg), and Parrot Anafi (320 grams / 0.32 kg). A synthetic distractor aircraft named 'Custom Heavy Lifter' with mass 25.5 kg is also added to the database. All metadata weight values match official manufacturer specifications or valid mathematical conversions from grams to kilograms.
